nodes.name: Blue-whiskered tanager
nodes.summary: Blue-whiskered tanager（Tangara johannae）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Blue-whiskered tanager。

nodes.name: Blue-whiskered tanager
nodes.summary: The blue-whiskered tanager (Tangara johannae) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is found in the Chocó of Colombia and Ecuador. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. It is threatened by habitat loss. References

nodes.name: Tangara
nodes.summary: Tangara（Tangara）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联26种鸟类，如Blue-and-black tanager、Beryl-spangled tanager、斑颊靓唐纳雀等26种鸟类。
